response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior engineer with strong full-stack and systems credentials, but the role specifically targets a C++ developer with deep expertise in STL, multi-threaded networked systems, message brokers, IEC 62443 SDL, and industrial protocols. Resume shows only a brief ~6-month C/C++ stint at National Instruments over a decade ago and a small C++ bachelor-thesis project; primary stack has since been TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. No evidence of MQTT, industrial cybersecurity standards, IoT protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850), or automation-domain experience.
strengths: 8+ years senior-level engineering with strong testing/TDD and architecture mindset
Some prior C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on an engineering tools product
Polyglot systems experience including DLang microservices handling millions of req/sec
concerns: Minimal recent C++/STL work; primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js, not the role's core language
No demonstrated experience with IEC 62443, SDL, or industrial cybersecurity standards
No exposure to industrial protocols (MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850) or automation domain

key_factors.factor: Senior engineering breadth and architecture skills
